title: Lesson Tracker Web: Dashboard de Aulas + Performance por Aula
plan: Add lesson_stats table to analytics_schema.py for pre-computed lesson performance data
Extend analytics_pipeline.py to aggregate hand_lessons data (accuracy, volume, trends per lesson/category/game_type) and persist to analytics.db

Add prepare_lessons_data() function in src/web/data.py with overview cards (total lessons, classified hands, global accuracy, mastered count), per-lesson stats with health badges, category breakdown, trend calculation, and study suggestions
Add 'Aulas' tab to sub_tabs in src/web/app.py context processor
Add lessons route handler in src/web/routes/cash.py calling prepare_lessons_data()
Add lessons route handler in src/web/routes/tournament.py calling prepare_lessons_data()

Create src/web/templates/cash/lessons.html with overview cards, accuracy-by-category bar chart, sortable/filterable lessons table, drill-down modal for hand details, errors-only filter, and study suggestions section
Add drill-down modal JS logic and error filter toggle to app.js if needed
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
